items.title: Microsoft warns users of 'Crypto Clipper' malware spread via USB drives
items.summary: The malware blends data theft with remote code execution, “turning a financially motivated stealer into a lightweight backdoor,” Microsoft said.

items.title: Aster popped over 10% on radical 'buyback and burn' upgrade. But gains were short-lived
items.summary: ASTER sees two-way volatility as bullish protocol-specific news meets hawkish Fed.

items.title: Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption
items.summary: Chain of Thought is our new expert-hosted webinar series, taking you behind the scenes of real investigations, emerging typologies and… The post Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption appeared first on Chainalysis.

items.title: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as a renewed Hormuz threat clouds US-Iran ceasefire talks
items.summary: Crypto firmed over the weekend after Friday's sell-off, with bitcoin recovering toward $64,000. Permanent ceasefire talks open in Switzerland, but Iran's order to close the Strait of Hormuz again revives the risk the deal was meant to settle.

items.title: Smart-contract and DeFi coins lead losses as bitcoin wilts for 4th straight day
items.summary: Concerns about STRC, the dividend-paying preferred stock from Strategy continue to dominate market sentiment.

items.title: Bitcoin falls below $63,000 as risk assets sell off and the week's bounce fades
items.summary: Crypto dropped across the board on Friday in holiday-thinned trading, giving back the week's gains. With oil down 9% and the Iran deal signed, the question turns to whether this cycle gets an altseason at all.

items.title: $13B Bitcoin options expiry looms: Will bulls endure more pain in June?
items.summary: Bitcoin bears hold the upper hand in the upcoming Bitcoin options expiry, a potentially early warning that more BTC downside could unfold.

items.title: Aave survived $8.45B in withdrawals, but risk questions remain
items.summary: Aave handled $8.45 billion in withdrawals without freezing funds, but the episode raised fresh questions about hidden risks in DeFi lending.

items.title: Ethereum faces core development funding crisis, former contributor warns
items.summary: The warning comes as the Ethereum Foundation reduces spending, adjusts its treasury strategy and undergoes a wave of leadership departures.

items.title: Ethereum's biggest 'sandwich' bot drained of $7.5 million in ironic exploit
items.summary: Blockaid said an attacker tricked Jaredfromsubway.eth into approving fake trading routes, then used those approvals to drain WETH, USDC and USDT.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs shed record $6.4B in 30 days amid crypto winter chill
items.summary: US-listed spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds saw their biggest 30-day net outflow since launching in 2024, coming as Bitcoin fell 17% over the past month.

items.title: Notorious ‘sandwich attack’ bot Jaredfromsubway.eth exploited for $7.5M
items.summary: Jaredfromsubway.eth was responsible for 70% of sandwich attacks on Ethereum between November 2024 and October 2025.

items.title: AI is making crypto security cheaper, faster and harder to ignore
items.summary: As AI-powered security tools become cheaper, faster and more widely available, researchers said they could reshape what the crypto industry considers reasonable due diligence before deploying code, potentially altering expectations for developers and institutions.

items.title: How STRC lost its par: The timeline behind Strategy's preferred-stock meltdown
items.summary: From a bond buyback and dwindling cash reserves to a bitcoin bear market, the sequence of events that turned STRC's par-value challenge into a marketwide debate.

items.title: Bitcoin rotations into altcoins collapses: Have altseasons 'disappeared'?
items.summary: BTC's crypto market dominance is holding above a key support, signaling Bitcoin may keep absorbing capital from altcoins and delay a broader altseason.

items.title: Crypto industry looks to stablecoins and DeFi revisions in MiCA 2.0
items.summary: The European Commission is seeking comment on how it can tweak MiCA, its regulatory framework for the crypto and blockchain industries.

items.title: Pudgy Penguins expands retail footprint with Target trading card rollout
items.summary: The NFT-born franchise is bringing its Vibes Series 3 trading cards to Target stores across the US as it expands into physical products and mainstream retail.

items.title: Philippine SEC signals readiness for RWA tokenization
items.summary: Philippine SEC Commissioner Rogelio Quevedo told Cointelegraph that tokenized assets could give Filipinos more legitimate investment options while helping steer them away from scams.

items.title: Crypto kidnappers who robbed Minnesota family of $8M plead guilty
items.summary: Two Texas brothers admitted to holding a Minnesota family at gunpoint and forcing the transfer of $8 million in cryptocurrency.
